rules_secondary: This market will expire the first 2:05 PM ET following the release of a Federal Reserve statement for their May 7, 2025 meeting or one week following the last day of that meeting.

rules_secondary: This market will expire the first 2:05 PM ET following the release of a Federal Reserve statement for their May 01, 2024 meeting or one week following the last day of that meeting.
